title: Eminence - Rekt in prod
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by manipulate token price on bonding curve

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints a new token using a flash loan and immediately manipulates its price

red_flags: Unusual token minting shortly after flash loan
summary: The attacker used a flash loan to mint EMN tokens and then manipulated the price of the tokens on the bonding curve, draining the contract of funds. A guard could have detected this by blocking any transaction that mints a new token using a flash loan and immediately manipulates its price.
